hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && case "$FILE" in *.java) java -jar tools/google-java-format.jar --replace "$FILE" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0
if git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; echo 'Uncommitted changes detected. Review with git diff.' >&2; exit 0
